tests.command: conda run -n qwen3vl env PYTHONPATH=src python -B -m unittest discover -s tests/p1 -v

real_small_preflight.expected_fail_closed_error: no training-eligible spatial source; approve exact source license evidence before a formal Small build

human_action_required: Approve exact source-by-source data license evidence and permitted task roles.
For Sen12Landslides, explicitly approve CC-BY-4.0 research training use plus required Sentinel, Copernicus and DEM attribution obligations.
Do not promote MMRS aggregate components or RSGPT restricted data without their separate component/owner decisions.
warnings: Real Small was not built because all nine live source registry rows remain allowed_for_training=false.
Synthetic Small demonstrates engineering behavior only and is not scientific or data-license acceptance.
